PyCon 2025

The Annual Python Programming Conference

Register Now Learn More

About PyCon 2025

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual gathering for the Python programming community. Join thousands of developers, data scientists, educators, and enthusiasts from around the world.

🎤 Keynote Speakers

Hear from industry leaders and Python core developers about the future of Python and cutting-edge innovations.

💻 Workshops & Tutorials

Hands-on learning sessions covering web development, data science, machine learning, and more.

🤝 Networking

Connect with fellow Pythonistas, share ideas, and build lasting professional relationships.

🚀 Open Source Sprints

Contribute to Python projects and collaborate with maintainers in dedicated sprint sessions.

Conference Schedule

Day 1 - May 15, 2025

09:00 - 10:00

Opening Keynote

Welcome address and vision for Python's future

10:30 - 12:00

Morning Talks

Parallel sessions on web frameworks, async programming, and testing

13:00 - 14:30

Afternoon Workshops

Hands-on tutorials: Django, FastAPI, and Data Analysis with Pandas

15:00 - 17:00

Lightning Talks & Networking

Quick presentations and community meetups

Day 2 - May 16, 2025

09:00 - 10:00

Keynote: AI & Machine Learning

The role of Python in modern AI development

10:30 - 12:00

Technical Sessions

Deep dives into performance optimization and security

13:00 - 16:00

Open Source Sprints

Contribute to Python projects with core maintainers

16:30 - 17:30

Closing Ceremony

Wrap-up and announcements for PyCon 2026

Venue & Location

Convention Center

Address:
123 Python Boulevard
Tech City, TC 12345
United States

Getting There

  • By Air: 15 minutes from Tech City International Airport
  • By Train: Direct connection to Central Station
  • By Car: Ample parking available on-site

Accommodation

Special rates available at partner hotels within walking distance. Details will be sent upon registration.

📍 Interactive Map

Convention Center
Tech City

Register for PyCon 2025

Early Bird

$299

Until March 1, 2025

  • ✓ Full conference access
  • ✓ All workshops & tutorials
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Networking events
  • ✓ Lunch & refreshments
Most Popular

Regular

$399

Until April 30, 2025

  • ✓ Full conference access
  • ✓ All workshops & tutorials
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Networking events
  • ✓ Lunch & refreshments

Student

$149

Valid student ID required

  • ✓ Full conference access
  • ✓ All workshops & tutorials
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Networking events
  • ✓ Lunch & refreshments

Note: Registration includes access to all conference sessions, workshops, and social events. Group discounts available for teams of 5 or more.

The annual Python programming conference bringing together developers from around the world.
